# Fork-local files — protected during upstream sync.
#
# Used by .github/workflows/sync-upstream.yml (fork-support infrastructure):
# when a scheduled upstream merge conflicts on a file listed here, the
# fork's version wins automatically ("ours"); conflicts in any other file
# stop the sync for manual resolution.
#
# In the canonical repo this list is empty. Forks that carry local-only
# files (extra workflows, packaging overrides, formulas) list them here,
# one path per line, relative to repo root. Comments (#) and blank lines
# are ignored. Listing this file itself keeps the fork's list intact when
# the upstream template changes.
